result.stdout:
Usage: immerse <assembly-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <assembly-path>            Path to the assembly to weave

Options:
  -s, --search-dir <dir>     Search directory for assemblies (repeatable)
  -v, --verbose              Print weaver info messages
  -h, --help                 Show this help
